evals.prompt: Write an article about: How AI coding assistants (like Gemini/Claude) are changing developer workflows. Use the feidieshuo-style.md as the style guideline.
evals.expected_output: A 2000-word article in feidieshuo style about AI coding assistants, following the 631 track structure with 4-5 images (detailed alt text and titles).
expectations: The article is at least 1500 words long
The article contains 4-5 images formatted as ![alt](url "title")
Images have descriptive prompt-like alt texts (>30 chars)
It uses the 631 ratio (approx 60% dry content, 30% hook, 10% conversion)

evals.prompt: Write an article about: A developer's journey leaving a big tech company to build a solo indie product. Use the feidieshuo-style.md as the style guideline.
evals.expected_output: A 2000-word story in feidieshuo style about an indie developer's transition, following the 361 track structure with 4-5 images (detailed alt text and titles).
expectations: The article is at least 1500 words long
The article contains 4-5 images formatted as ![alt](url "title")
Images have descriptive prompt-like alt texts (>30 chars)
It uses the 361 ratio (approx 30% dry content, 60% hook, 10% conversion)
